docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 55.00 - SERVED AUG-18-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KIRSCHBAUM, VICTOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-14-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. MEDIATED DISPOSITION. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VISHWANATH, AADITYA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIRSCHBAUM, VICTOR $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $885.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY VISHWANATH, AADITYA AS TO DEFENDANT KIRSCHBAUM, VICTOR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-14-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-14-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF VISHWANATH, AADITYA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY VISHWANATH, AADITYA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2015 - JUDGMENT.
